duties: Record every significant event in trace/
Generate session summaries for context rehydration
Answer queries about past decisions, deliveries, and user interactions
Alert when context loss risk is high (>50 turns, >24h sessions)
Maintain state.json as the single source of truth for project status

structure.INDEX.md: Master index of all trace entries by date, chapter, and type
structure.deliveries/: Per-chapter delivery records with gate status and context snapshot
structure.user_interactions/: User feedback, Q&A, requests, and preferences
structure.context_summaries/: Session summaries for agent context rehydration
structure.state.json: Current project state: chapter status, open issues, active agents
